Watch YouTube
without the bad words.

Safeplay quietly mutes profanity as videos play. Nothing to set up — just pick how strict you want it.

WHAT YOU HEAR
Before
"What the **** is going on here?"
After
"What the muted is going on here?"

How strict should it be?

You can change this anytime from the popup.

You're all set.

On any YouTube video, click the red Safeplay button next to Subscribe to start filtering.

LOOK FOR THIS ON ANY VIDEO
Channel
284K subs
Subscribe
Filter with Safeplay
